title: South Africa Corporate Income Tax Return (ITR14) — Dormant Company pathway
description: File a South African company income tax return (ITR14) via SARS eFiling for a company classified as 'Dormant' — one that was not actively trading and did not receive any income or incur any expenses during the year of assessment. The ITR14 is a dynamically customised return: the 'Information to create this income tax return' wizard first asks the filer to classify the company (dormant, share block company, body corporate, micro business, small business, or medium to large business), and SARS generates only the Annexure that classification requires. This document models Annexure A, the Dormant Company pathway: the Registered Details and Dormant wizard questions (§11.1), the pre-populated Company/Close Corporation Particulars, Tax Practitioner Details, Dormant Company Details, and Declaration sections of the return itself (§11.2). It deliberately does not model: the repeating Share/Membership Register and Details of Beneficial Owner(s) containers (up to 3 classes of shares and up to 20 members/beneficial owners each, per-row), the repeating Schedule of Local/Foreign Capital Gains and Losses, or the Special Economic Zone container's full mandatory sub-questionnaire — spec v0.3 has no repeating/nested field model (SPEC.md Section 12), the same limitation recorded in za/sars/individual-income-tax-return-itr12's VERIFICATION.md for that return's rental/trust/partnership grids. It also does not model Annexures B-E (Body Corporate/Share Block, Micro Business, Small Business, Medium to Large Business), which apply to non-dormant companies and are structurally much larger returns (see VERIFICATION.md). It does not submit the return, compute tax payable, or determine any refund/assessment amount — the live SARS eFiling platform is always authoritative.

source.documentRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 (How to complete the Income Tax Return (ITR14) for Companies — External Guide), Revision 19, effective 2 March 2026

verification.notes: GOV-1268 'GovSchema Standard Research' research cycle: CATALOG.md's 'Known Gaps & Opportunities' section (as updated by GOV-1261) explicitly flagged 'ZA SARS ITR14 has not yet been scouted' as the next open corporate-tax candidate, alongside IE Form CT1 (set aside the same cycle as a poor candidate given its far larger scope). Authored from SARS' own current 'How to complete the Income Tax Return (ITR14) for Companies' External Guide (IT-GEN-04-G01, Revision 19, effective 2 March 2026), fetched directly from sars.gov.za (HTTP 200, a genuine 174-page text layer extracted in full with pdfjs-dist's getTextContent, no OCR needed). The guide documents five company-type Annexures (A: Dormant, B: Body Corporate/Share Block, C: Micro Business, D: Small Business, E: Medium to Large Business), each a structurally distinct return generated by the wizard's classification answer (guide Section 3, 'DETERMINE COMPANY CLASSIFICATION'). This document scopes to Annexure A (Dormant Company, guide Section 11, pp.11-24) only: it is the smallest and most self-contained of the five (Annexures B-E each run to 30-100+ pages and include Balance Sheet, Income Statement, and full Tax Computation containers that a dormant company, by definition, does not complete), and matches this registry's established practice of authoring the well-bounded sub-process first (the same discipline used for sg/iras/corporate-income-tax-return-form-cs choosing Form C-S over Form C, and za/sars/individual-income-tax-return-itr12 choosing the 'Standard' wizard over the 'Comprehensive' one). Deliberately out of scope, all per the same 'no repeating/nested field model' limitation (SPEC.md Section 12): the Share/Membership Register (guide §11.2.7, up to 4 sub-containers: 1 Membership + up to 3 Classes of Shares, each itself repeating up to 20 rows) and Details of Beneficial Owner(s) (§11.2.8, repeats 0-9 times per howManyBeneficialOwners) — this document models only the top-level gating/count fields (doesCompanyHaveMembers, howManyBeneficialOwners, howManyClassesOfShares) an agent needs to know whether those containers will appear, not their per-row contents; the Schedule of Local/Foreign Capital Gains and Losses (§11.2.10, an unbounded repeating table) — only the top-level gating booleans (hadLocalCapitalGainOrLoss, hadForeignCapitalGainOrLoss, hadDebtReducedForNoConsideration) are modelled; and the Special Economic Zone container's full mandatory sub-questionnaire (§11.1.5, §11.2.6, six-plus follow-up declarations contingent on which SEZ(s) the company operates in) — only the top-level qualifying-company gate (isQualifyingSezCompany) is modelled, on the same reasoning sg/iras/corporate-income-tax-return-form-cs used to defer the Enterprise Innovation Scheme's per-activity breakdown. The >R5 million 'Balance Sheet for Small Business/Dormant Companies' container that guide §11.1.2(b)(iii)(II) says is displayed when movementInAssetsLiabilitiesReserves exceeds R5,000,000 is out of scope for the same reason (it is itself Annexure B/C's full Balance Sheet container, not a dormant-specific form). isTaxPractitionerFiling is an inferred gating field, not a verbatim-quoted wizard question: the guide's §11.2.2 section heading is 'TAX PRACTITIONER DETAILS (IF APPLICABLE)' with no explicit Yes/No question shown in the Annexure A wizard text (unlike za/sars/individual-income-tax-return-itr12's explicit 'Mark with an X if you are completing the return as a tax practitioner' question) — SARS eFiling most likely determines applicability from the logged-in user's practitioner-registered login role rather than an in-form question; this is flagged honestly here rather than presented as a directly-sourced field. provinceOfMajorityIncome's nine-province-plus-International enum is drawn verbatim from the guide's own list (§11.2.1(b)(ii): 'Eastern Cape... Free State... Gauteng... Kwa-Zulu Natal... Limpopo... Mpumalanga... Northwest... Northern Cape... Western Cape... International') — every value is directly present in the source text; the list's own lettering (A, E, F, G, H, I, J, K, L, M, skipping B-D) is itself a PDF-extraction/layout artifact in SARS' guide, not a sign that intermediate options were invented or omitted. reasonForDormancy (§11.2.3(a)) is modelled as an open string, not a closed enum, because the guide states only 'select the applicable reason for dormancy from the dropdown box' without ever enumerating the dropdown's own values — fabricating a value list was avoided; flagged below as needing a first-party SARS source (e.g. a live eFiling walkthrough) to close. Not placed on the edition axis, following the same za/sars/individual-income-tax-return-itr12 and GSP-0019 precedent: `edition.scheme` has no `za-tax-year` member yet (spec v0.3 SPEC.md Section 5.7). A mock conformance/za/sars/corporate-income-tax-return-itr14-dormant/1.0.0/application-packet.json test run (a small holding company that ceased all trading activity at the start of the year of assessment, filing via eFiling with no tax practitioner, no VDP application, no SEZ claim, and zero beneficial owners) was independently checked with a from-scratch GSP-0013 condition evaluator, and passed with 0 violations across 33 collected fields and 14 correctly not-applicable fields (47 total), confirming the becameDormantDuringYear/isActingAsNominee/isRegisteredForCustoms/relatesToVoluntaryDisclosureProgramme requiredWhen gates all fire correctly and that tax-practitioner and passive-income fields correctly stay out of scope. A mutation test (flipping isActingAsNominee to true without adding the now-required receivedTaxablePassiveIncome) confirmed the evaluator correctly flags the newly-required field as a violation. Status remains 'draft' pending a live eFiling walkthrough (registration requires a South African company tax reference number, Company Representative/Public Officer eFiling login, and the underlying legal-entity verification step described in guide Section 7, none of which could be exercised in this environment) — see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: companyClassification
fields.label: Company classification
fields.description: The company's classification, selected on the ITR14's 'Information to create this income tax return' wizard page. This determines which Annexure (A-E) the return generates. This document models Annexure A (Dormant Company) only.
fields.sourceRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 Section 3(b) — 'a company may... be classified as dormant, a share block company, a body corporate, a micro business, small business or as a medium to large business'

fields.name: detailsVerifiedAndConfirmed
fields.label: Have the banking, public officer and contact details of the company been verified and confirmed as correct?
fields.description: If 'No', the ITR14 return cannot be requested; the legal entity information must first be updated via 'Maintain SARS Registered Details' on eFiling.

fields.name: publicOfficerCompliant
fields.label: Does the company confirm that the person appointed as public officer complies with the requirements of section 246 of the Tax Administration Act, 2011 (not removed for misconduct, not convicted of a relevant offence, tax compliant, and not disqualified from serving as director/office bearer/trustee)?
fields.description: Displayed once detailsVerifiedAndConfirmed is 'Yes'.
fields.sourceRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 §11.1.1(b)-(c) — displayed from the 2024 year of assessment onwards

fields.name: isCompanyDormant
fields.label: Is the company dormant?
fields.description: A dormant company was not actively trading and did not receive any income or incur any expenses during the year of assessment. If the company traded during any part of the year, it will not be regarded as dormant.

fields.name: becameDormantDuringYear
fields.label: Did the company become dormant/inactive during the year of assessment?
fields.description: If 'Yes', the company is not regarded as a Dormant Company for return-generation purposes and the Company Type question set (Annexure B territory) displays instead. This document scopes to a company that was dormant for the whole year of assessment (answer 'No' here).

fields.name: movementInAssetsLiabilitiesReserves
fields.label: Movement in assets, liabilities and/or reserves (R)
fields.description: Total amount, in Rand, representing the movement in the company's assets, liabilities and/or reserves for the year of assessment. If this value exceeds R5,000,000, SARS displays a 'Balance Sheet for Small Business/Dormant Companies' container for completion — out of scope for this document (see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: isCooperative
fields.label: Is the company a co-operative as defined in section 1 of the Income Tax Act?
fields.description: Applicable from the 2025 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: isAssociationOfPersons
fields.label: Is the company an association of persons as contemplated in paragraph (d) of the definition of 'company' in section 1?
fields.description: Applicable from the 2025 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: isCollectiveInvestmentScheme
fields.label: Is the company a Collective Investment Scheme registered as a company?
fields.description: Applicable from the 2025 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: isNonProfitCompany
fields.label: Is the company a non-profit company as defined in section 1 of the Companies Act?
fields.description: Applicable from the 2025 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: isBodyCorporateSectionalTitles
fields.label: Is the company a body corporate established in terms of the Sectional Titles Act, 1986?
fields.description: Applicable from the 2025 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: isShareBlockCompany
fields.label: Is the company a share block company as defined in the Share Blocks Control Act?
fields.description: Applicable from the 2025 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: isResidentInSouthAfrica
fields.label: Is the company resident in South Africa for income tax purposes?
fields.description: A company is non-resident if it is not incorporated, established, or formed in South Africa and does not have its place of effective management in South Africa.

fields.name: doesCompanyHaveMembers
fields.label: Does the company have members?
fields.description: Only displayed if the company is an association of persons, a co-operative, a body corporate, or a non-profit company. If 'Yes', the Share/Membership Register container displays (out of scope for this document — see VERIFICATION.md). 'Voluntary Association'/'association of persons' company types and Body Corporate/Co-Operative types must answer 'Yes' with at least 1 (or, for Body Corporate/Co-Operative, at least 2) members.

fields.name: howManyBeneficialOwners
fields.label: How many beneficial owners does the company have?
fields.description: Zero (0) is allowed where no natural person ultimately owns or exercises effective control over the company. If greater than zero, the Details of Beneficial Owner(s) container displays, repeated per owner — out of scope for this document (see VERIFICATION.md). Applicable from the 2024 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: howManyClassesOfShares
fields.label: How many different classes of shares have been issued by the company?
fields.description: If greater than zero, the Share/Membership Register's Classes of Shares sub-section displays, limited to the 3 highest Rand-value classes regardless of the number entered — out of scope for this document (see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: hadLocalCapitalGainOrLoss
fields.label: Did the company have any transactions or events which resulted in a locally sourced capital gain or loss (including crypto assets)?
fields.description: If 'Yes', the Schedule of Local Capital Gains and Losses in respect of the disposal of assets (including crypto assets) displays — a repeating table out of scope for this document (see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: hadForeignCapitalGainOrLoss
fields.label: Did the company have any transactions or events which resulted in a foreign sourced capital gain/loss (including crypto assets)?
fields.description: If 'Yes', the Schedule of Foreign Capital Gains and Losses in respect of the disposal of assets (including crypto assets) displays — a repeating table out of scope for this document (see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: hadDebtReducedForNoConsideration
fields.label: Has any debt been reduced for no consideration which has the effect of reducing the company's assessed capital loss under paragraph 12A(4) of the Eighth Schedule?
fields.description: If 'Yes', follow-up questions on whether the reduction was for a local and/or foreign asset display, each in turn displaying a 'Reduction of Assessed Capital Loss due to Debt Reduction' section — out of scope for this document (see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: relatesToVoluntaryDisclosureProgramme
fields.label: Does any declaration in this return relate to an application made under the SARS Voluntary Disclosure Programme?
fields.description: If 'Yes', the Voluntary Disclosure Programme section displays on the return for completion.

fields.name: isQualifyingSezCompany
fields.label: Is the company a qualifying company as defined in section 12R (Special Economic Zones)?
fields.description: If 'Yes', the Special Economic Zones (SEZ) section displays for completion, including which SEZ(s) the company is located in and a series of mandatory qualification-confirmation questions — out of scope for this document (see VERIFICATION.md). Introduced from the 2017 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: wantsS7fDeduction
fields.label: Does the company want to claim a deduction i.t.o. section 7F in respect of SARS interest repaid that was previously taxed i.t.o. section 7E?
fields.description: Section 7E requires SARS interest to be declared in the year SARS paid it; interest subsequently repaid can be claimed as a deduction under section 7F, limited to the amount declared under section 7E. This container displays where the company answered 'Yes' to detailsVerifiedAndConfirmed.

fields.name: s7fDeductionAmount
fields.label: Amount of SARS interest repaid that was previously taxed i.t.o. section 7E (R)
fields.description: Source code 4052.

fields.name: isRegisteredForCustoms
fields.label: Is the company registered/licensed for customs purposes?
fields.description: If 'Yes', the number-of-customs-client-codes question displays.

fields.name: numberOfCustomsClientCodes
fields.label: Number of customs client codes allocated to this company
fields.description: Displayed once isRegisteredForCustoms is 'Yes'.

fields.name: taxReferenceNumber
fields.label: Tax reference number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The company's SARS income tax reference number. Pre-populated (read-only) in the Company/Close Corporation Particulars container.

fields.name: yearOfAssessment
fields.label: Year of assessment
fields.description: Pre-populated (read-only) in the Company/Close Corporation Particulars container.

fields.name: registeredName
fields.label: Registered name
fields.description: Pre-populated (read-only) in the Company/Close Corporation Particulars container.

fields.name: tradingName
fields.label: Trading name
fields.description: Pre-populated (read-only) in the Company/Close Corporation Particulars container.

fields.name: companyRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Company/CC registration number
fields.description: Pre-populated (read-only) in the Company/Close Corporation Particulars container.

fields.name: financialYearEnd
fields.label: Financial year-end
fields.description: Format CCYYMMDD. Pre-populated (read-only) in the Company/Close Corporation Particulars container.

fields.name: isReturnForForeignBranchOrAgency
fields.label: Is this return in respect of a branch/permanent establishment/agency of a foreign company?
fields.description: Part of the Company/Close Corporation Particulars container.

fields.name: provinceOfMajorityIncome
fields.label: Where the majority of the company's taxable income/loss is derived from
fields.description: The nine South African provinces plus 'International'. The source guide's own list uses discontinuous lettering (A, E, F, G, H, I, J, K, L, M) — a PDF layout artifact, not a sign of omitted options; every value here is verbatim from the guide's list.

fields.name: standardIndustryCode
fields.label: Standard Industry Code (SIC) applicable to the main activity of the company
fields.description: Selected from the Standard Industry Codes booklet published at www.statssa.gov.za.

fields.name: profitCodeMainSource
fields.label: Profit code of the main source of income
fields.description: Pre-populated with code 9994 and locked when the company is dormant.

fields.name: isTaxPractitionerFiling
fields.label: Return completed by a registered tax practitioner
fields.description: Inferred gating field: guide §11.2.2 is headed 'TAX PRACTITIONER DETAILS (IF APPLICABLE)' but the Annexure A wizard text does not show an explicit Yes/No question for it (unlike za/sars/individual-income-tax-return-itr12's explicit tax-practitioner-declaration question) — applicability is most likely determined by the logged-in eFiling user's practitioner-registered role rather than an in-form question. Flagged in VERIFICATION.md as needing first-party confirmation.

fields.name: taxPractitionerRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Tax practitioner registration number
fields.description: Alphanumeric, 9 characters; the first two characters must be 'PR'.

fields.name: taxPractitionerTelNumber
fields.label: Tax practitioner telephone number
fields.description: Numeric field, up to 15 characters.

fields.name: taxPractitionerNoEmailDeclared
fields.label: Mark here with an 'X' if you declare that you do not have an email address
fields.description: If marked, the Tax Practitioner Email address field is locked and greyed out.

fields.name: taxPractitionerEmailAddress
fields.label: Tax practitioner email address
fields.description: Free text, up to 52 characters.

fields.name: reasonForDormancy
fields.label: Reason for dormancy
fields.description: Selected from a dropdown box. The guide directs the filer to 'select the applicable reason for dormancy from the dropdown box' without enumerating the dropdown's own values; modelled as an open string rather than a fabricated closed enum — see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: isActingAsNominee
fields.label: Is the company acting as, or carrying on the activities of, a nominee?
fields.description: Applicable from the 2016 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: receivedTaxablePassiveIncome
fields.label: Did the company receive any taxable passive income?
fields.description: Applicable from the 2016 year of assessment onwards; mandatory once isActingAsNominee is 'Yes'.

fields.name: taxablePassiveIncomeAmount
fields.label: Taxable passive income (R)
fields.description: Source code 4290.

fields.name: isPartyToAssetHoldingContract
fields.label: Is the company a party to any contract in terms of which it has undertaken to conduct any activity or hold any assets on behalf of another person during the current or a future year of assessment?
fields.description: Part of the Dormant Company Details container.

fields.name: vdpApplicationNumber
fields.label: VDP application number issued by SARS
fields.description: Alphanumeric; the first three characters must be 'VDP'. No spaces or dashes. Must be for an approved VDP agreement between SARS and the company.

fields.name: declarationDate
fields.label: Declaration date
fields.description: Format CCYYMMDD. The Company Representative/Public Officer's eFiling login serves as authentication for submission; if submitted at a SARS branch, the signature pad is signed instead.

documents.label: Annual Financial Statements (Income Statement, Balance Sheet, Notes to the AFS)
documents.sourceRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 §9(c) — 'For Small Businesses and Medium to Large Businesses... submission of signed off supporting Annual Financial Statement (AFS) is compulsory. For all other companies, it is optional.'

documents.label: Declaration
documents.statement: The ITR14 return is a legal declaration to SARS and by signing, you agree that the information is accurate.

steps.title: Information to create this income tax return — classification and registered details
Information to create this income tax return — Dormant and Capital Gain/Loss Transactions
Information to create this income tax return — Voluntary Disclosure Programme, SEZ, s7F, Customs
Dormant Company Details (applicable to Dormant Companies only)
